# Vigil Security Services
> Professional security services across Greater London.
> SIA-licensed officers. Directly employed. DBS-checked.
> Company: Vigil Services Ltd, Reg: 11756806
> Insurance: £10M public liability

## Who We Are
Vigil Security Services provides SIA-licensed security personnel
across Greater London. All officers are directly employed by
Vigil Services Ltd — not agency supplied. Every officer holds a
current SIA licence and Enhanced DBS certificate.

We do NOT claim SIA Approved Contractor status, ACS registration,
BS7858 vetting, or ISO certification unless explicitly confirmed.

## Core Services
- [Manned Guarding London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/manned-guarding-london/)
- [Mobile Patrols London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/mobile-patrols-london/)
- [Key Holding and Alarm Response London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/key-holding-alarm-response-london/)
- [Event Security London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/event-security-london/)
- [Door Supervisors London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/door-supervisors-london/)
- [Retail Security London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/retail-security-london/)
- [Construction Site Security London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/construction-site-security-london/)
- [CCTV Monitoring London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/cctv-monitoring-london/)
- [Concierge Security London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/concierge-security-london/)

## Service Descriptions

**Manned Guarding London**: Static officers deployed at your premises
for contracted hours. Suitable for offices, retail, healthcare, and
residential developments requiring a visible, accountable security
presence. Officers are SIA-licensed, DBS-checked, and directly employed.

**Mobile Patrols London**: Officers patrol your site at random
intervals during contracted hours. Lower cost than static guarding.
Suitable for lower-risk commercial properties, car parks, and
multi-site portfolios where deterrence is the primary objective.

**Key Holding and Alarm Response London**: Vigil holds a key to your
premises and responds to alarm activations 24 hours a day, 365 days
a year. Removes the obligation from you or your staff to respond to
out-of-hours alarms. Includes a post-attendance report.

**Event Security London**: SIA-licensed officers for conferences,
exhibitions, product launches, corporate dinners, and public events.
Crowd management, access control, and guest liaison. London-wide
coverage across all event venue types.

**Door Supervisors London**: SIA Door Supervisor-licensed officers for
licensed premises — pubs, bars, nightclubs, and venues requiring
licensed door supervision under the Private Security Industry Act 2001.
All officers hold a current SIA Door Supervisor licence.

**Retail Security London**: Loss prevention officers and store
detectives for retail environments. Uniformed and plainclothes
options. Suitable for supermarkets, fashion retail, electronics,
and high-value retail across Greater London.

**Construction Site Security London**: 24/7 site security for
construction projects. Access control, plant and materials protection,
CCTV monitoring, and night patrol. Officers experienced in CDM 2015
site environments.

**CCTV Monitoring London**: Remote CCTV monitoring from a dedicated
monitoring centre. Operator-verified alarm response, real-time
intervention, and recorded footage. Reduces the need for on-site
static guarding.

**Concierge Security London**: Front-of-house security for residential
developments, managed offices, and hospitality environments. Combines
access control, visitor management, and concierge duties.

## Borough Coverage
Vigil Security Services covers all Greater London boroughs:
Barnet, Hackney, Islington, Westminster, Tower Hamlets, Camden,
Southwark, Canary Wharf, City of London, Greenwich, Lewisham,
Lambeth, Wandsworth, Hammersmith and Fulham, Kensington and Chelsea,
Fulham, Ealing, Hounslow, Richmond, Kingston, Merton, Sutton,
Croydon, Bromley, Bexley, Havering, Barking and Dagenham,
Newham, Waltham Forest, Redbridge, Enfield, Haringey.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Are your security officers SIA licensed?
A: Yes. Every officer holds a current SIA licence appropriate
to their role — Door Supervisor, Security Guard, or CCTV.

Q: Are your officers directly employed or from an agency?
A: All Vigil Security officers are directly employed by
Vigil Services Ltd. We do not use agency staff or sub-contractors.

Q: What insurance does Vigil Security carry?
A: £10M public liability insurance. Employer's liability held.

Q: Do you cover all London boroughs?
A: Yes — Greater London and all 32 boroughs.

Q: Is door supervisor licensing required by law?
A: Yes. The Private Security Industry Act 2001 requires all
door supervisors at licensed premises to hold a current
SIA Door Supervisor licence.

Q: Can you provide security for events?
A: Yes. We supply SIA-licensed event security officers for
conferences, exhibitions, corporate events, and public events
across London.

Q: What is key holding and alarm response?
A: We hold a key to your premises and respond to alarm
activations on your behalf, 24 hours a day, 365 days a year,
so you do not receive call-outs in the night.

Q: Do you carry out DBS checks on all staff?
A: Yes. Every officer holds an Enhanced DBS certificate before
starting any client assignment.

Q: What sectors do you serve?
A: Retail, hospitality, construction, events, NHS and healthcare,
education, residential developments, and corporate offices.

Q: What is the difference between manned guarding and mobile patrols?
A: Manned guarding provides a static officer at your premises
throughout the contracted hours. Mobile patrols involve an officer
visiting your site at irregular intervals during the patrol period
— lower cost, suitable for lower-risk sites requiring deterrence
rather than constant presence.

Q: Do you provide 24/7 security cover?
A: Yes. Round-the-clock cover is available across all service types
— manned guarding, mobile patrols, key holding, and CCTV monitoring.

Q: What is the SIA and why does it matter?
A: The Security Industry Authority (SIA) is the UK regulator for
the private security industry. All front-line security workers must
hold a current SIA licence under the Private Security Industry Act
2001. Engaging unlicensed guards is a criminal offence.

Q: Can you cover multiple sites under one contract?
A: Yes. We manage multi-site security contracts for property
owners, facilities managers, and corporate occupiers across Greater
London under a single account manager.

Q: How do I get a quote?
A: Call 020 3973 8887 or complete the enquiry form at
https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/contact/

## Regulatory Compliance
- Private Security Industry Act 2001: Fully licensed
- SIA licensing: All relevant officers hold current licences
- GDPR 2018: Data handled lawfully
- Working Time Regulations 1998: Complied with for all officers
- Licensing Act 2003: Door supervisors licensed for all relevant venues
- Greater London coverage: All 32 boroughs
